title: trisetum mongolicum var. elatior
intro: Trisetum mongolicum var. elatior, also known as Mongolian hair grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used in medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Trisetum mongolicum var. elatior include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and exhibit potential anti-cancer properties. In herbal medicine, Trisetum mongolicum var. elatior is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and its extracts have been studied for their potential use in the development of new medicines.
